scores.correctness_notes: The agent correctly identifies IngressPerAppRequirer and the general pattern, but the gold standard focuses on the data schema/contract (application-data and unit-data databag entries) rather than Python API, which the agent largely ignores. The gold standard explicitly notes the charmlibs docs cover interface specs, not the Python API.
scores.hallucination_notes: strip_prefix parameter in IngressPerAppRequirer constructor is not confirmed and likely invented; provide_ingress_requirements(port=...) is not verified; on.ready/on.revoked event names are plausible but not confirmed by gold standard; self.ingress.url property is plausible but unverified. Core class names (IngressPerAppRequirer, IngressPerUnitRequirer) are real.
